emails.theme: N-ear 360 Flexo: Keep Both Ears on the World (open-ear situational awareness)
emails.product: N-ear 360 Flexo Earpiece, Black, Braided Fiber (SHEEPDOG Exclusive)
emails.shortDescription: Fresh angle per client Jul 17 (product promoted many times, need a new hook). Leads on the OPEN EAR design as the hero, not specs or back-in-stock: most earpieces seal your ear canal and trade your hearing for your radio; the N-ear 360's open ear tip lets you hear your surroundings AND your radio in the same ear. Dark hero 'Keep Both Ears on the World' with first CTA, a short situational-awareness reframe, then three reasons (01 Situational Awareness, 02 Zero Ear Fatigue, 03 Patented Bend Over Ear) alternating image side, a vest-routing band (22 inch braided cable routes between Velcro straps, engineered in Denmark) with a one-line connector guide (3.5mm Motorola/Kenwood/Tait/EF Johnson, 2.5mm OEM Harris), What Is Included graphic, positive-framing demand band (most loved exclusive, limited quantities), final CTA. Verified available:true + images 200 on 2026-07-17.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 17 21:19: write a NEW-angle, high-converting email on the N-ear 360 Flexo (promoted many times before). New lead angle = open-ear situational awareness ('keep both ears on the world'); distinct from prior Flexo sends (back-in-stock May 25, CYCLONE2/TRIAD2/TRIAD PRO bundles, June 'what agencies are ordering' roundup). Rules honored: product-page images only (verified 200); no 'sold out' (high demand / limited quantities positive framing); no radio-compatibility grid (one connector line only); no hyphens/dashes in prose (brand name 'N-ear 360' keeps its own hyphen); no pricing; no hype words; operator-to-operator tone. REV Jul 17 23:24 per client: added a VISIBLE SL/PL block (3 subject + 3 preview options) at the very top of the email HTML per SLPL-visible rule, and rescheduled send from Jul 17 to Jul 19. REV2 Jul 20 per client feedback ('does not mention this is the exclusive black flexo'): added a hero eyebrow 'The SHEEPDOG Exclusive | Black Braided Fiber' and reworked the demand band to state explicitly that the Black Braided Fiber N-ear 360 Flexo is a SHEEPDOG exclusive you will not find anywhere else. Redeployed + verified live 200. Acknowledged in Slack thread 1784303354.616229.
emails.creativeDirection: Sheepdog charcoal #282828 / red #DE2A2A, Archivo Black headings, Archivo body. Field-shot hero on dark, three alternating image/text reason rows, light-gray vest-routing band, What Is Included graphic, dark demand band, standard footer. 600px single column, mobile-first.

emails.theme: TRIAD PRO Kits: One Sealed Mic, Two Kits (IP68)
emails.product: TRIAD PRO PTT/Mic, IP68, Quick Disconnect. Kit 1: Acoustic Tube Earpiece. Kit 2: N-ear 360 Flexo Bundle (Sheepdog Exclusive).
emails.shortDescription: REV2 per client feedback. Sells the TRIAD PRO itself: hero on loud/clear comms, early CTA, a 4-point 'Why Operators Run It' grid (clear loud audio via premium directional mic + built-in loud speaker, tactile side PTT, IP68 sealed/submersible as one durability point, quick disconnect), then 'Pick Your Kit' two cards each with who-it-is-for + earpiece USP in the description (Acoustic Tube = discreet/comfortable/easy-clean for uniformed patrol; N-ear 360 Flexo = most loved exclusive earpiece, bend-over-ear fit, braided fiber, designed in Denmark, high demand/limited quantities), one short Alligator+MOLLE clip USP line with link at the end, real-review placeholder, final CTA. Same URL. All kit pages + images verified 200.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 13 'write triad pro kits email.' REV2 after client feedback Jul 13 17:50: copy not engaging, IP68 1.5m/30min should not be the whole USP, sell the mic; each kit card must state who it is for + earpiece USP; drop the clean-setup/clip-it section and move Alligator+MOLLE to one short USP line/link at end. Rules honored: IP68 only (no IP67 mention/compare) and demoted to one point; QD = setup/removal push-pull not radio swap; Alligator = uniform shirts and external carriers + MOLLE webbing, no duty belts/collars; one brief radio compatibility line, no grid; no sold-out (high demand/limited quantities positive framing); N-ear Flexo details from client feedback file; product-page images only; no pricing; no hyphens/dashes in prose. Review block placeholder for a real Triad Pro review. REV3 (client feedback Jul 13 18:14): banner headline unclear + SLPL vague/no hook. Hero headline changed to 'Say It Once.' with payoff subhead (directional mic + loud speaker cut through wind/engines/noise, heard the first time); subjects rewritten hook-led under 50 chars ('Say it once. Get heard.' / 'Cut through the noise.' / 'Heard over wind, engines, and chaos.'); previews benefit-led. Copy-ready (rev3) Jul 13. Rescheduled from Jul 13 to Jul 15 per client (Slack, Jul 14).
emails.creativeDirection: Sheepdog charcoal #282828 / red #DE2A2A, Archivo Black headings. Waterproof mic hero, early CTA, IP68 submersion section, dark spec strip, two-kit chooser cards (each own Shop Now), clean-setup clip + QD block, review placeholder, final CTA, standard footer.

emails.theme: TSUNAMI: Runs in Any Conditions (IP67 field reliability)
emails.product: TSUNAMI Waterproof (IP67) PTT/Mic, Quick Disconnect (MOLLE + Alligator clip)
emails.shortDescription: Fresh Tsunami angle per client (already ran new arrival, two ways, MEG giveaway, FAQ). Field CONDITIONS / reliability theme: IP67 seal keeps it transmitting through rain, sweat, mud and long shifts. Three condition cards (Rain / Sweat / Mud and Dust), spec row (IP67, 32in cord, 3.5mm port), clean-setup section (360 rotating MOLLE + Alligator clips, QD push-pull), 3.5mm/AWARE pairing, real-review placeholder, final CTA. Both clips verified in stock via Shopify JSON; all images from Tsunami product pages, verified 200.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 9: promote Tsunami rest of month with a NEW theme (not feature list/FAQ). Rules honored: no 'Rugged. Waterproof.' subhead; IP67 described directly, no comparison; QD = setup/removal not radio swap; MOLLE = plate carriers/tactical vests, Alligator = uniform shirts/external carriers; no radio grid; no sold-out language; product-page images only; no hyphens/dashes. Review block is a placeholder to pull a real Tsunami review. Copy-ready Jul 9.
emails.creativeDirection: Sheepdog charcoal #282828 / red #DE2A2A, Archivo Black headings. Field/lifestyle hero, early CTA, 3 red-top condition cards, spec row, clean-setup (product image + 360 clip + QD copy), pairing, review placeholder, final CTA, standard footer.

emails.theme: Happy 4th of July. Most Loved Gear.
emails.product: Best sellers: HDLO Tactical Earpiece Braided (Black), Motorola APX Bluetooth Adapter with Wireless PTT, N-Ear 360 Flexo Braided Fiber (Sheepdog Exclusive), CYCLONE2 QD Waterproof N-ear Flexo Bundle
emails.shortDescription: Independence Day best sellers email, same spirit as last year (flag hero, thank-you to on-duty officers, Most Loved Gear, Happy Independence Day close), fresh copy + layout. Four best sellers, each verified in stock, own Shop Now. Client brief + last year reference (Jul 2).
emails.creativeDirection: Flag hero, dark tactical, product cards with brief functional copy + separate Shop Now, Happy Independence Day close
